name: Barefoot Burgers
desc: Grass-fed beef burgers with secret "Bay Sauce."
about: No shoes, no worries, just great meat. We source everything within 50km of Tauranga.
allergens: Gluten Free, Nut Free (Tree Nuts), Peanut Free, Egg Free

name: The Coastal Taco
desc: Fresh Pacific-style tacos and handmade salsas.
about: We started in a backyard in the Mount and now we bring the crunch to the coast! Local fish, local lemons, big vibes.
allergens: Gluten Free Options, Dairy Free Options, Shellfish Free
